utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified per item:
- property: includes selected property with details (address, price, specs, schools, condition, viewing time) -> fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (lender, contact, interest rate, down payment, monthly payment, carrying costs, amortization) -> fully specified with terms.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (firm, contact, cost, services) -> fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (company, contact, cost, services, timeline) -> fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (package, cost, included utilities/providers, timeline) -> fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (purchase price, closing costs, legal, inspection, moving, utility setup, total, budget range, status, timeline) -> fully specified.
All 6 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes selections across several categories. We need to match each selected item to its corresponding rating from the ground-truth. Items found: a purchase property is specified by address but not present in the ground-truth catalog, so no direct property rating can be mapped. Financing: a traditional mortgage-type solution is used (RBC lender, standard mortgage structure) which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' in purchase_financing. Legal services: 'Miller & Associates' providing a package for CAD $1,200 corresponds to 'Premium Legal Package' at the same price. Moving services: 'Oakville Elite Movers' at CAD $650 corresponds to 'Standard Moving' priced at CAD $650. Utility setup: 'Premium Utilities Package' at CAD $280 corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' at the same price.
